style: Cohesive set of card-game illustrations for a near-future AI strategy game. Muted, sophisticated palette (deep blues, magenta, teal accents on near-black). Semi-isometric techno-illustration, clean vector shading, subtle grain, no text, no logos, 4:3 framing with clear focal subject and room at the bottom for an overlaid label.

cards.prompt: rows of glowing GPU server racks in a vast dark datacenter, cables like rivers of light
a holographic neural network being dissected by floating analytic tools, a researcher silhouette
a summit table of diplomats with a translucent globe and AI treaty hologram above it
brilliant researchers collaborating around a glowing whiteboard of equations, warm rim light
a soaring financial skyline made of circuit-board towers, ascending green value curves
an unexpected breakthrough: a singular bright filament unraveling into new architecture, dramatic

techCategories.prompt: an abstract self-improving intelligence, recursive glowing loops of light
humanoid robots working an automated factory floor, sparks and precision
AI-designed proteins folding, luminous molecular structures in a lab
a cell being reset to youth, time-reversal motif, soft hopeful light
a fusion tokamak ring blazing with contained plasma, immense power
a levitating room-temperature superconductor, programmable matter morphing
a fault-tolerant quantum computer, golden dilution refrigerator chandelier
an orbital datacenter and the beginnings of a Dyson swarm around a star
a warp bubble bending starlight, an Alcubierre drive prototype in deep space
a transparent constitutional framework over a city, balance of control and freedom
